SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-30-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-30-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS FILED BY ADRIANO, RUBEN A. C/O LAW OFFICES OF PETSAS & STEPHENS, LLP WILLIAMS, KIRSTIN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-30-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADRIANO, RUBEN A. C/O LAW OFFICES OF PETSAS & STEPHENS, LLP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, KIRSTIN $3,190.00 PRINCIPAL, $170.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,360.00, DEFENDANT ADMITS LIABILITY. NO EVIDENCE CONTRADICTING PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. GENERAL DAMAGES NOT AWARDED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, KIRSTIN
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
